name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Read saved Codex sessions and hand them to ChatGPT without submitting a Codex model turn.

interface.shortDescription: Send saved Codex context to ChatGPT
interface.longDescription: Installs a hook-free external launcher that reads the latest saved Codex session and repository context, then opens a prepared ChatGPT handoff without submitting a Codex model turn.
defaultPrompt: Install the external Sidecar launcher from this plugin's repository.
